Name: Ceramic/ Pot
Description: Premium ceramic pots with smooth or matte finishes, ideal for food storage, decor, or kitchen use. Available in various shapes and colors.

Name: Ceramic/ Bowls
Description: Elegant, microwave-safe ceramic bowls in solid colors and patterned designs, perfect for serving salads, soups, and sides.

Name: Ceramic/ Teapot
Description: Heat-retaining ceramic teapots with ergonomic handles and spouts, available in classic and modern designs to enhance your tea experience.

Name: Ceramic/ Plate
Description: Scratch-resistant ceramic plates with minimalist to intricate designs, adding sophistication to any dining setup.

Name: Ceramic/ Planter
Description: Durable ceramic planters with drainage holes, suitable for indoor and outdoor spaces, in both minimalist and decorative styles.

Name: Plant/ Indoor Plant
Description: Variety of indoor plants that thrive in low to moderate light conditions, perfect for decorating homes and offices while purifying air naturally.

Name: Plant/ Succulent
Description: Low-maintenance, drought-tolerant succulents in various shapes and colors, ideal for adding a touch of greenery to indoor spaces with minimal upkeep.

Name: Plant/ Air Plant
Description: Unique air plants that grow without soil, ideal for creative arrangements in terrariums or mounted on decorative stands.

Name: Plant/ Outdoor Plant
Description: Hardy outdoor plants suitable for gardens and balconies, available in a range of species to complement various outdoor spaces.

Name: Plant/ Cactus
Description: A collection of low-maintenance cacti that require minimal water, perfect for indoor displays or as unique garden additions

Name: Flower/ Perennials
Description: Beautiful perennials that bloom year after year, adding vibrant colors to gardens with minimal care required.

Name: Flower/ Annual
Description: Bright and colorful annual flowers that bloom for one season, ideal for creating vibrant flower beds and seasonal displays.

Name: Flower/ Wildflower
Description: Native wildflowers that bring natural beauty and attract pollinators, suitable for naturalizing areas or creating a meadow-like garden.

Name: Flower/ Bulb
Description: Seasonal flower bulbs that produce beautiful blooms, perfect for adding a splash of color to gardens in spring and summer.

Name: Flower/ Tropical Flower
Description: Exotic tropical flowers with vibrant colors and unique shapes, ideal for creating a lush, tropical garden atmosphere.
